title: Aggregator Registration
description: Pre-approval payload submitted when an organisation requests an Aggregator account. Only the minimum identity needed to email an admin and create a disabled Keycloak user. Personal name is captured during first login via the Keycloak Update Profile required action; full profile is collected post-login.

aggregator_type.title: Aggregator Type
aggregator_type.description: Whether this aggregator represents opportunity seekers (job seekers, students) or opportunity providers (employers, training partners).

association.title: Organisation
association.description: Parent organisation or association the aggregator represents.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email used for verification, admin approval correspondence, and login.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Mobile number in international E.164 format. Indian numbers may omit the +91 prefix.
